name: autoresearch
description: Autonomous experiment loop: try ideas, keep what works, discard what doesn't, never stop.

interface.shortDescription: Run autonomous experiment loops in your repo.
interface.longDescription: Autoresearch bundles the experiment-loop skill and MCP tools for iterative optimization work inside Codex.
defaultPrompt: Run autoresearch to optimize my test suite runtime.
Use autoresearch to improve this project's build time.
